reports.title: Active Threats
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) RETURN count(t) AS total_threats

reports.title: Critical Threats
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat {severity: 'CRITICAL'}) RETURN count(t) AS critical_threats

reports.title: High-Risk Vulnerabilities
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 RETURN count(v) AS high_risk_vulns

reports.title: Vulnerable Hosts
reports.query: MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 RETURN count(DISTINCT h) AS vulnerable_hosts

reports.title: Threat Severity Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) RETURN t.severity AS severity, count(*) AS threat_count ORDER BY CASE t.severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 4 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC

reports.title: Threat Detection Timeline (Last 60 Days)
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) WHERE t.first_seen IS NOT NULL AND datetime(t.first_seen) > datetime() - duration('P60D') WITH date(datetime(t.first_seen)) AS detection_date, t.severity AS severity RETURN detection_date, severity, count(*) AS threats_detected ORDER BY detection_date DESC

reports.title: Critical Vulnerabilities Analysis
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 8.0 OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v) WITH v, count(h) as affected_hosts RETURN v.cve_id AS vulnerability_id, v.title AS vulnerability_name, v.cvss AS cvss_score, v.severity AS severity, affected_hosts ORDER BY v.cvss DESC, affected_hosts DESC LIMIT 15

reports.title: High-Risk Vulnerability Network
reports.query: MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 RETURN h, v LIMIT 40

reports.title: Host-Vulnerability Attack Surface
reports.query: MATCH path = (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= $cvss_threshold RETURN path LIMIT 30

reports.title: Critical Vulnerabilities per Host (CVSS >= 7.0)
reports.query: MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 RETURN h.hostname AS vulnerable_host, h.ip AS host_ip, v.cve_id AS vulnerability, v.cvss AS cvss_score, v.severity AS vulnerability_severity, v.title AS vulnerability_title ORDER BY v.cvss DESC LIMIT 50

reports.title: Attack Surface Analysis by Host
reports.query: MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WITH h, count(v) AS vuln_count, max(v.cvss) AS max_cvss, avg(v.cvss) AS avg_cvss ORDER BY vuln_count DESC, max_cvss DESC LIMIT 20 RETURN h.hostname AS hostname, h.ip AS ip_address, vuln_count, round(max_cvss * 10) / 10 AS highest_cvss, round(avg_cvss * 10) / 10 AS avg_cvss

reports.title: Vulnerability Severity Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WITH v.severity AS severity, count(v) AS vulnerability_count RETURN severity, vulnerability_count ORDER BY vulnerability_count DESC

reports.title: Crown Jewel Assets Security Status
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true}) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WITH d, h, collect(v) AS vulnerabilities, max(v.cvss) AS highest_cvss RETURN d.name AS crown_jewel_asset, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity, h.hostname AS host, size(vulnerabilities) AS vulnerability_count, COALESCE(highest_cvss, 0) AS highest_cvss ORDER BY d.sensitivity_score DESC, highest_cvss DESC

reports.title: High-Sensitivity Asset Security Network
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) WHERE d.sensitivity_score >= 0.6 OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) RETURN d, h, v LIMIT 40

reports.title: Vulnerability Mitigation Coverage (ActionCards)
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 OPTIONAL MATCH (ac:ActionCard)-[:MITIGATES]->(v) WITH v, count(ac) AS mitigation_actions RETURN v.cve_id AS vulnerability, v.cvss AS cvss_score, v.severity AS severity, mitigation_actions, CASE WHEN mitigation_actions > 0 THEN 'Mitigated' ELSE 'Unmitigated' END AS mitigation_status ORDER BY v.cvss DESC, mitigation_actions ASC

reports.title: Threats by Severity Level
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat {severity: $threat_severity}) RETURN t.title AS threat_name, t.description AS description, t.first_seen AS first_detected, t.source AS threat_source ORDER BY t.first_seen DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: Monthly Threat Detection Trends
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) WHERE t.first_seen IS NOT NULL WITH date.truncate('month', date(datetime(t.first_seen))) AS threat_month, t.severity AS severity RETURN threat_month, severity, count(*) AS threat_count ORDER BY threat_month DESC LIMIT 50

reports.title: Vulnerability Risk Statistics
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WITH v.severity AS severity, count(v) AS vulnerability_count, avg(v.cvss) AS avg_cvss RETURN severity, vulnerability_count, round(avg_cvss * 10) / 10 AS avg_cvss_score ORDER BY avg_cvss DESC

reports.title: Threat Source Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) RETURN t.source AS threat_source, count(*) AS threat_count ORDER BY threat_count DESC

reports.title: Critical Vulnerabilities (CVSS >= 8.0)
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WHERE v.cvss >= 8.0 OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v) WITH v, count(h) AS affected_hosts RETURN v.cve_id AS vulnerability, v.cvss AS cvss_score, v.title AS vulnerability_name, v.severity AS vulnerability_severity, affected_hosts ORDER BY v.cvss DESC LIMIT 20
